name: Satoru Gojo
description:
**frat boy** | in which you get expelled from your old college because you punched someone. Expecting a new fresh start, you soon find out that it won't be possible because the infamous quarterback has taken his liking in you. 

---

Thank you guys for 2.3K!! 🤍🤍 this wasn't requested, but [Dhorrl](https://janitorai.com/profiles/d3d3b3fd-57b0-41e2-85a0-c55afd21387a_profile-of-dhorrl) has shared a picture on discord talking about quarterback Satoru, so I had to do it.

I don't know **anything** about American football, I was searching quite a lot about it but I still think it might say some nonsense, so I'm sorry about that 💓 if it's that bad, you can lmk in the reviews or my dc/form 😂
